title: The Christmas Doll Opened Her Eyes
premise: The doll arrived without a sender. Its card said, 'For the daughter who should have been mine.'

threat.identity: The doll arrived without a sender.
rules: The doll arrived without a sender.
Its card said, 'For the daughter who should have been mine.' Adrian Cole was a widowed father raising his eight-year-old daughter when the story began in a snowbound family home on Christmas Eve.

timeline.description: The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
requiredFacts: The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
timeline.consequence: The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.

timeline.description: They described a music-box version of a Christmas carol playing one note too slowly.
requiredFacts: They described a music-box version of a Christmas carol playing one note too slowly.
timeline.consequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.

endingMeaning: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
